auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to track orders and checkout faster.
auth.signupSubtitle: Join One Source for fresh produce delivered across Uganda.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
auth.notConfigured: Auth is not configured. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to a .env file in the project root (use the anon public key from Supabase → Project Settings → API).
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to choose a new password.
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for that email, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter and confirm your new password below.
auth.passwordUpdated: Your password has been updated. You can sign in with your new password.
auth.resetLinkInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one to continue.
auth.otpSubtitle: We sent a verification code to {{email}}. It expires in 5 minutes.
auth.otpHint: Enter the 6–8 digit code from your email. It expires in about 5 minutes.
auth.welcomeEmailNote: We've sent a welcome email to your inbox.
auth.passwordStrengthFair: Fair — try adding numbers or symbols.

1.title: Fresh Apples – Premium, pack of 5
1.description: Crisp, sweet apples. Perfect for snacking or baking. Sourced from trusted Ugandan suppliers.
1.delivery: FREE same-day delivery on orders over USh 100,000

2.title: Fairtrade Bananas – Ripe & Ready, approx. 5
2.description: Fairtrade bananas, naturally ripened. Ideal for smoothies, cereal, or on the go.

3.title: Fresh Broccoli – Large head
3.description: Fresh broccoli, rich in vitamins. Steam, roast, or stir-fry for a healthy side.

4.title: Vine Tomatoes – on the vine, 450g
4.description: Sweet vine-ripened tomatoes. Great for salads, sauces, and sandwiches.

5.title: Iceberg Lettuce – Crisp & fresh
5.description: Crunchy iceberg lettuce. The classic base for Caesar salad and burger toppings.

6.title: Fresh Basil – Living pot, 1 plant
6.description: Living basil plant. Pick leaves as needed for pasta, pesto, and Italian dishes.

7.title: Organic Carrots – 500g, Soil Association
7.description: Certified organic carrots. Sweet, crunchy, and perfect for roasting or juicing.

8.title: Organic Avocados – Ready to eat, pack of 2
8.description: Organic Hass avocados, ripened for immediate use. Ideal for toast, salads, and guacamole.

9.title: Maris Piper Potatoes – Baking & roasting, 2kg
9.description: Versatile Irish potatoes. Fluffy when mashed, crispy when roasted. A Ugandan kitchen staple.

10.title: Red Onions – 1kg net
10.description: Mild, sweet red onions. Essential for salads, curries, and caramelising.

11.title: Fresh Strawberries – 400g punnet
11.description: Sweet, juicy strawberries. Peak season flavour — perfect for desserts and smoothies.

12.title: Blueberries – 150g
12.description: Plump, antioxidant-rich blueberries. Great for breakfast bowls, baking, and snacking.

13.title: Easy Peelers – Seedless, 600g net
13.description: Sweet, easy-to-peel mandarins. Lunchbox favourite and vitamin C boost.

14.title: Large Lemons – 3 pack
14.description: Juicy lemons for cooking, baking, and drinks. Zest and juice add brightness to any dish.

15.title: Ripe Mango – Large, ready to eat
15.description: Sweet, fragrant mango. Slice for fruit salad, smoothies, or Thai-style salads.

16.title: Pineapple – Sweet Golden, medium
16.description: Golden pineapple with tropical sweetness. Grill, blend, or enjoy fresh.

17.title: Conference Pears – Ripe & ready, 4 pack
17.description: Juicy Conference pears with a delicate flavour. Perfect with cheese or in salads.

18.title: Fresh Courgettes – 3 pack
18.description: Tender green courgettes. Spiralise, grill, or bake into a light summer dish.

19.title: Mixed Salad Leaves – 120g washed & ready
19.description: Pre-washed mixed leaves including rocket, spinach, and frisée. Open, serve, enjoy.

20.title: Organic Spinach – 200g
20.description: Tender organic baby spinach. Wilt into pasta, blend into smoothies, or use in salads.

21.title: Sweetcorn – 2 cobs
21.description: Fresh sweetcorn cobs. Boil or barbecue for a classic summer side.

22.title: Fresh Raspberries – 125g
22.description: Fragrant raspberries. Perfect for puddings, yoghurt, or eating fresh.

23.title: Grapefruit – Ruby Red, 2 pack
23.description: Ruby red grapefruit halves. A refreshing, tangy start to the day.
23.delivery: FREE delivery on orders over USh 100,000

24.title: Passion Fruit – 3 pack
24.description: Tart, aromatic passion fruit. Scoop over pavlova, cheesecake, or tropical fruit salad.

product.customersAlsoViewed: Customers who viewed this item also viewed
product.customersAlsoViewedSubtitle: Popular picks from across the store
product.relatedProductsSubtitle: More fresh picks you might like
product.legalDisclaimerText: Actual product packaging and materials may contain more and different information than what is shown on our website. We recommend that you do not rely solely on the information presented here and that you always read labels, warnings, and directions before using or consuming a product.
product.disclaimerText: Content on this site is for information purposes only. Contact the manufacturer with questions about allergens or medical use. One Source Uganda accepts no liability for inaccuracies from third-party suppliers.
product.reviewsHowItWorks: Customer reviews help you learn more about the product and decide if it is right for you.
product.sampleReview1Body: Fresh and exactly as described. {{product}} arrived well packaged. Will order again.
product.sampleReview2Body: Happy with the purchase. Delivery was on time and the produce was usable straight away.
product.rollOverToZoom: Roll over image to zoom in
product.reportIssue: Report an issue with this product
product.customersSayNote: AI-generated from customer review themes on similar fresh produce.
product.sampleReview3Body: Arrived on time with solid packaging. Product matched the listing.

errors.loadProducts: Could not load products. Check server/.env (Supabase) and run: cd server && npm run dev
errors.passwordResetFailed: Could not send password reset email
errors.passwordResetTimeout: The request took too long. Please try again in a moment.
errors.signInTimeout: Sign-in timed out. Supabase could not send the login email — cPanel SMTP does not work from the cloud. Use Brevo or Resend in Supabase SMTP settings, or turn off custom SMTP temporarily.
errors.otpEmailRateLimit: Too many login emails sent. Wait about an hour, or raise the limit under Supabase → Authentication → Rate Limits.
errors.otpEmailSendFailed: Could not send the login email. Check Supabase → Authentication → SMTP settings (use Brevo or Resend, not cPanel mail).
errors.supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase is not configured. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to a .env file in the project root.

shop.setupHint: Configure Supabase in server/.env, then run cd server && npm run dev

ingredients.sauce: {{name}} (chilli peppers, salt, vinegar, oil, spices). See pack for allergens.

storage.roots: Cool, dark, ventilated place. Use within 2 weeks.
storage.chilled: Refrigerate 0–4°C. Use by date on pack.

about.yam1: White yams are a staple across Africa and the Caribbean — starchy tubers with brown skin and white flesh.
about.yam2: Boil, fry, or roast. Popular as pounded yam or fufu with soups and stews.
about.yam3: Any problems with perishable products must be reported within 24 hours of delivery.
about.chilli1: Fresh hot peppers — ideal for sauces, marinades, and traditional dishes.
about.chilli2: Store in a cool place or refrigerate to maintain freshness.
about.chilli3: Report quality issues within 24 hours of delivery.
about.freshCategory: Fresh {{category}} from Ugandan farms and cooperatives.
about.report24h: Report perishable quality issues within 24 hours of delivery.
about.primeEligible: Prime eligible — same-day delivery on qualifying orders.

description.farmFresh: Farm-fresh {{name}} supplied through One Source Uganda.
description.yam1: Fresh white yam with brown tough skin and white starchy flesh. Grown in fertile soils and selected for cooking quality.
description.yam2: Cook boiled, fried, or roasted. A main ingredient in fufu, pounded yam, and many African dishes.
description.yam3: Product of {{origin}}. Report delivery issues with perishables within 24 hours.

customersSay.freshQuality: Customers find it fresh and good quality
customersSay.mixedQuality: Customers have mixed opinions on quality
customersSay.yamNote: — freshness and size vary by delivery
customersSay.chilliNote: — heat level and ripeness are as expected for the variety
customersSay.defaultNote: — value and packaging receive mixed feedback

warranty.p1: Fresh produce is covered by our freshness guarantee. Contact customer service within 24 hours of delivery if items arrive damaged or below quality — include photos where possible.
warranty.p2: Refunds or replacements are issued at One Source Uganda's discretion in line with our returns policy.
warranty.p3: Regardless of statutory rights, many products qualify for return within 30 days where applicable. See return details for exceptions.
